options.label: Brushless DC Motor
options.description: High efficiency, low maintenance, good for continuous operation

options.label: DC Motor
options.description: Simple brushed DC motor, basic speed control

options.label: Direct Drive Motor
options.description: No gearbox, motor directly coupled to load

options.label: Harmonic Drive
options.description: High gear reduction with zero backlash

options.label: Hydraulic Actuator
options.description: High force output using pressurized fluid, heavy-duty applications

options.label: Linear Actuator
options.description: Direct linear motion without rotation conversion

options.label: Not Applicable
options.description: No actuators present or not specified

options.label: Pneumatic Actuator
options.description: Compressed air driven, fast and clean for light loads

options.label: Servo Motor
options.description: High precision position control with feedback, common in robotics

options.label: Shape Memory Alloy
options.description: Temperature-activated shape change for compact actuation

options.label: Stepper Motor
options.description: Precise incremental movement without feedback, cost-effective

options.label: Voice Coil Motor
options.description: Fast, precise linear motion for small displacements
